primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: From enrollment to the end of treatment at 3 months
primaryOutcomes.description: The body weights of the individuals will be measured with a body analyzer sensitive to 0.1 kilograms for all participants.

primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: From enrollment to the end of treatment at 3 months
primaryOutcomes.description: The height of the participants will be measured in cm with a portable stadiometer without shoes, with the head in an upright position and in the Frankfort plane.

primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: From enrollment to the end of treatment at 3 months
primaryOutcomes.description: Body Mass Index will be reported in kg/m² by dividing the body weight by the square of the height.

eligibilityCriteria.description: Those with a Mini Mental Test result of ≥24 points
Those with a Mini Mental Test result of <24 points
Those with a disease requiring a special diet other than Parkinson's Disease
